content: Next.js 16 App Router admin dashboard patterns: use server components for data fetching (React cache() to dedupe queries per request), TanStack Table v8 for server-side paginated data grids, Recharts 3 for metrics visualization. Feature flags: evaluate on server in Server Components, pass as props to client components — never fetch flags client-side to avoid flicker. Admin route protection: middleware or layout.tsx server component checks session + role. shadcn/ui data-table pattern with useServerFilters hook is the standard pattern. Makerkit Next.js Drizzle kit demonstrates the full pattern: server-side metrics query in layout, admin-prefixed routes under /admin/.
